overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through a medieval cliffside village, transitioning from cobblestone streets to a rocky cliff overlook with panoramic water views, then continuing along the cliff path past a stone tower as dusk approaches and lighting gradually dims.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval village cobblestone street ascending uphill

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks steadily uphill through the village street, passing villagers in medieval dress and approaching a stone archway

notable_agents.action: villager in green dress walking alongside the path
villager in brown coat walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: stone and timber medieval buildings with red tiled roofs lining the right side of the path
irregular cobblestone street surface ascending the hill
grassy slope with wildflowers between the path and the buildings
simple wooden post fence along the left edge of the path

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks uphill through a medieval village street paved with cobblestones. Stone buildings with red roofs line the right side while a grassy embankment rises beside them. Villagers in period clothing walk in various directions, creating a moderate crowd density in this narrow enclosed space.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone archway transition from village to cliff edge

events.description: Geralt passes through the stone archway, transitioning from the enclosed village street to the open cliff edge
ground surface transitions from cobblestone to rocky dirt path as the terrain opens to the cliff

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks through the stone archway, leaving the village buildings behind and emerging toward the cliff edge

entered.detail: large stone archway with wooden gate marking the village exit
narrow dirt and rock path along the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: Geralt passes through a stone archway that marks the edge of the village. The enclosed cobblestone street gives way to a rocky path as the space opens to the cliff edge, with the village buildings now behind him.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky cliff overlook with panoramic water and island views

events.description: Geralt stops walking and stands still on the cliff edge to observe the landscape
camera pans westward revealing distant islands and expansive water views under overcast skies

agents.ego_description: Geralt stands motionless on the rocky cliff edge, slowly turning to survey the expansive water view, distant islands, and forested hills

entered.detail: expansive blue-gray body of water stretching to the horizon
tree-covered rolling hills surrounding the water
rocky islands with sparse vegetation scattered across the water
jagged rock outcrop where Geralt stands overlooking the drop

segments.scene_description: Geralt stands on a rocky cliff edge in a wide open space with full sky visibility. He observes a panoramic view of an expansive water body dotted with distant islands and surrounded by forested hills. The camera pans slowly to capture the vista while Geralt remains stationary.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliffside path with stone tower and military patrol

events.description: Geralt resumes walking along the cliff path toward the stone tower
lighting dims significantly as dusk approaches, ambient light decreases and artificial torch light becomes visible near the tower
encounters group of soldiers in red uniforms with halberds patrolling the cliff path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks along the cliff path toward the stone tower, passing soldiers in red uniforms and villagers as evening approaches

notable_agents.action: soldiers in red uniforms carrying halberds walking in formation along the path
villager leaning on wooden fence looking out at the water

entered.detail: tall rectangular stone tower with red tiled roof and flagpoles visible against the sky
stacked wooden barrels and crates beside the path
wooden cart with large wheels parked near the building wall
stone buildings reappearing along the left side of the path as the route curves back toward the village

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along the cliff path as the lighting dims toward dusk. A prominent stone tower with a red roof rises ahead. He passes soldiers in red uniforms patrolling the area and villagers gathered near the path. The water remains visible to the right while the village buildings reappear on the left, creating a medium-street layout along the cliff edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the enclosed streets of a medieval village out toward a panoramic cliffside overlook as daylight fades. It begins with Geralt walking uphill through a narrow cobblestone street lined with red-roofed stone buildings and a moderate crowd of villagers. As he passes through a stone archway, the confined village environment opens up into a rocky path at the cliff's edge, leaving the buildings behind. The scene then expands into a wide open space where the camera pans across a vast vista of forested hills and distant islands scattered across an expansive body of water. Finally, the camera follows Geralt along the cliff path as the lighting dims toward dusk, passing patrolling soldiers and a prominent stone tower while the village structures reappear on the left.
